author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Three Jewels - Chapter 11 The Nature of Existence
content:
Sangharakshita in Seminar:

THE THREE JEWELS: CHAPTER 11. THE NATURE OF EXISTENCE
Second ‘Transcriptions’ Edition
CONTENTS

These are the page numbers used in the first edition.]

19-26Self-centredness

42Summary of the first days discussion.
